summary_text: Thesis: Phase medical AI by risk and accountability, not by novelty. - Start with low-risk, high-friction workflows that recover clinician time. - Require audit trails, human override, and clear responsibility before broader use. - Use each phase to prove safety, workflow fit, and governance readiness. consulted_worldview_source: /Users/masayuki/.claude/docs/philosophy.md used_obsidian_for_worldview: no worldview_contract_applied: true
